docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $928.41 FILED BY CHEVRON FEDERAL CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT GARDNER,ADELL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-01-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT GARDNER,ADELL
